title: CLI: Skills Management

actors.name: Developer
actors.description: Runs the impeccable CLI to manage skills in their project

actors.name: ImpeccableStyleAPI
actors.description: External API at https://impeccable.style — serves command list and universal skill bundle

actors.name: NpxSkills
actors.description: External tool: `npx skills add pbakaus/impeccable` used during install

use_cases.name: List Available Skills (help)
steps: route to showHelp() when sub === 'help' or omitted
fetch GET https://impeccable.style/api/commands
sort commands by id
print table of /command + description (trimmed to 72 chars)
print total count and install/update hints

use_cases.name: Install Skills
steps: findProjectRoot() — walk up from cwd to .git
isAlreadyInstalled(root) — scan PROVIDER_DIRS for 'impeccable' sentinel skill
if already installed and !force → print message and exit(0)
execSync('npx skills add pbakaus/impeccable [-y]') — delegates to NpxSkills
if --prefix= flag: use given prefix; else if not -y: ask(user) for prefix
if prefix chosen: renameSkillsWithPrefix(root, prefix) — rename dirs + update SKILL.md cross-refs
run cleanup-deprecated.mjs (optional, skip if unavailable)
print 'Done! Run /[prefix]impeccable teach ...'
sub_functions: isAlreadyInstalled(root): checks PROVIDER_DIRS for sentinel dir names
renameSkillsWithPrefix(root, prefix): 3-pass — collect names, rename real dirs + update SKILL.md, fix symlinks
prefixSkillContent(content, prefix, allSkillNames): rewrites frontmatter name + /command refs in SKILL.md

use_cases.name: Update Skills
steps: run cleanup-deprecated.mjs pre-update (optional)
findProjectRoot()
findInstalledProviders(root) — list provider dirs that contain skill subdirs
if no providers found → error + exit(1)
downloadAndExtractBundle() → GET /api/download/bundle/universal, unzip to tmpDir
isUpToDate(root, providers, tmpDir): deduplicateProviders + compare SKILL.md hashes (normalized)
if up to date → cleanup tmpDir, print version, exit(0)
if not -y: ask(user) confirmation to update
deduplicateProviders(root, providers) — handle .claude → .agents symlinks
for each unique provider: copyDirSync(bundleSkill → localSkillsDir)
rmSync(tmpDir)
detectPrefix(root) — scan for '-impeccable' suffix to find prefix
if prefix found: renameSkillsWithPrefix(root, prefix) — re-apply prefix
run cleanup-deprecated.mjs post-update (optional)
print 'Updated N skill(s) to vX'
sub_functions: downloadAndExtractBundle(): downloads zip, unzips, returns tmpDir path
isUpToDate(root, providers, bundleDir): normalizeForHash strips provider paths + version field before SHA256 compare
deduplicateProviders(root, providers): realpathSync to deduplicate symlinked skill dirs
detectPrefix(root): looks for '<prefix>-impeccable' dir name pattern

use_cases.name: Check for Updates
steps: findProjectRoot()
isAlreadyInstalled(root) — if not installed: print hint + exit(0)
findInstalledProviders(root)
downloadAndExtractBundle() → GET /api/download/bundle/universal
isUpToDate(root, providers, bundleDir)
rmSync(bundleDir)
if up to date: getSkillsVersion(root) + print 'Skills are up to date (vX)'
if not up to date: print 'Updates available. Run skills update.'
sub_functions: getSkillsVersion(root): reads 'version:' field from SKILL.md frontmatter in any PROVIDER_DIR

key_relationships: UC2 uses NpxSkills (npx skills add pbakaus/impeccable)
UC3 <<extend>> UC4 (update performs the same up-to-date check first)
important_notes: install delegates to `npx skills add` for the actual file installation; only prefix/cleanup logic is internal
update bypasses `npx skills update` (known upstream bug) and downloads directly from API
prefix system: renames skill dirs (e.g. audit → i-audit) and rewrites /command refs inside SKILL.md
deduplication handles symlinked provider dirs (e.g. .claude/skills -> .agents/skills) to avoid double-writes
SKILL.md hashes are normalized (strip provider paths + version) for portable comparison across install methods
